EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Client T&A requirements
EmailTemplate.subject: Alliance Rural & Remote Health | Travel & Accommodation Requirements
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
NURSE AVAILABLE.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName}, {!Candidate.FirstName} [Designation] is available to assist with your deficit. Please see attached her CV and references for your persual.
Nurse name is available to start a contract [Start to End date]
[Nurse Name] referees mention:
XXXXXXX XXXXXXX XXXXXXX
[Nurse name] is travelling alone from [Home Town] and will / will not require accomodation.
If you think [Nurse name] would be helpful in covering your rostering needs, please let me know at your earliest convenience.
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Have a great day!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
